## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build/Tooling

## Scope

- [ ] Shared packages
- [ ] Core runtime services
- [ ] AI services
- [ ] Dashboard/UI
- [ ] Infrastructure/DevOps

## Validation

List exact commands run and high-signal outputs.

```text
<command output>
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Non-breaking changes only (or explicitly documented impact)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] README/docs updated when behavior changes
- [ ] Verification proof included
- [ ] Optional service impact explicitly called out (if any)
